remediation_history.findings_summary: Adversarial: 4 BLOCKER + 5 REQUIRED + 4 RECOMMENDED + 1 QI candidate. Claims: 2 BLOCKER + 4 non-blocking. Substantive remediations applied:
substantive_fixes: Deleted 3 P5 tautology theorems caught by adversarial reviewer that self-audit missed: analog_hawking_simulable_implies_both_conditions (identity-function on And), analog_hawking_simulable_of_both_conditions (trivial And-constructor), categoricalChernExpansion_uses_aperiodicLattice (LEM-vacuous first conjunct + already-proved second + decorative L parameter).
Dropped decorative _c0 parameter from IsAnalogHawkingClassicallySimulable predicate.
Added 3 missing bibkeys (YedidiaFreemanWeiss2003, Zurek1985, BiancoResta2011) to CITATION_REGISTRY with primary-source cache files at Lit-Search/Phase-6w/primary-sources/.

Down-toned D7 abstract LDP-framing overclaim: 'large-deviation rate function of the loop-correction terms' → 'structural tree indicator on the factor graph'; 'computable threshold' → 'fixed threshold' (also noted that the predicate uses Classical.byCases on an undecidable graph property, so the threshold check is information-theoretic, not algorithmic).

Down-toned D7 abstract platform-instantiation overclaim: 'We instantiate the demarcation on three analog-Hawking platforms' → 'analog-Hawking applications via the Kibble-Zurek-Unruh correspondence are sketched at the cross-module substrate level... with explicit per-platform (BEC, polariton, graphene Dirac fluid) instantiation bridges deferred to the D-bundle absorption pass'.
Updated theorem count: 67 → 65 substantive after the 3 deletions; first-claim disclaimer footnote added per finding 5.4.
Updated headline_theorems list (this metadata) to remove deleted theorems; collapsed crystalline + quasicrystalline pair into single difference-identity headline per finding 7.2.
